name: Adanac Molybdenum Corp.
description: Adanac Molybdenum Corp. is a Canada-based mineral exploration and development company. The company is primarily focused on the development of its 100%-owned Ruby Creek molybdenum project located near Atlin, British Columbia. Adanac Molybdenum Corp. aims to advance this world-class deposit towards production to supply the global steel and alloying industries with high-quality molybdenum.
